392 K0700A_CAL_PEN_CD K0700A_CAL_PEN_CD K0700A Percent Caloric Intake Through Parenteral/Tube Feeding Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the proportion of total calories that the resident received through parenteral or tube feeding. -=Not assessed/no information
1=25% or less
2=26-50%
3=51% or more
